name: py3-response-handler

metadata.name: py3-response-handler
metadata.summary: A Response Handler Library By Guolei

documentation:
# py3-response-handler

A Python3 Response Handler Library By Guolei

# Installation

```shell
pip install py3-response-handler
```

# Example

## Quickstart

### requests.Response Handler

```python
import requests

from py3_response_handler import Handler,HandlerType

response = requests.get("https://www.google.com")

response_handler=Handler.instance(HandlerType.REQUESTS_RESPONSE_HANDLER)

# requests.Response object
response_handler.response(response)

# requests.Response object content
response_handler.content(response, 200)

# requests.Response object text
response_handler.text(response, 200)

# requests.Response object text to bs4.Beautifulsoup object
response_handler.text_to_beautifulsoup(response, 200)

# requests.Response object json
response_handler.json(response, 200)

# requests.Response object json to addict.Dict object
response_handler.json_to_addict(response, 200)
```

## Advanced Usage

### requests.Response Handler

```python
import requests
from requests import Response
from py3_response_handler.requests import ResponseHandler


class MyResponseHandler(ResponseHandler):
    def your_function(self, response: Response):
        # your code
        pass


response = requests.get("https://www.google.com")
my_response_handler = MyResponseHandler()
my_response_handler.your_function(response)
```
